title: CVE-2026-10643: Zephyr IP Socket Recvmsg RCE
summary: [P1] Zephyr's IP socket recvmsg() implementation is vulnerable to arbitrary code execution, with no patch available. This affects Zephyr-based systems, particularly those exposed to the internet. Why now: Lack of patch availability increases the urgency to address this vulnerability. (confidence: 0.80)
classification_reasoning: Zephyr's IP socket recvmsg() implementation vulnerability allows for arbitrary code execution, fitting the rce problem type, and affects the framework layer.
